leadText: Large Leek (Japanese: ふといながねぎ Large Scallion) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Large Leek can be used as an ingredient in cooking , with a base Strength of 185. It can be used to cook the following recipes: Name Recipe Minimum pot size Spicy Leek Curry Large Leek ×14 Warming Ginger ×10 Fiery Herb ×8 32 Ninja Curry Greengrass Soybeans ×24 Large Leek ×12 Bean Sausage ×9 Tasty Mushroom ×5 50 " Immunity " Leek Salad Large Leek ×10 Warming Ginger ×5 15 Ninja Salad Large Leek ×15 Greengrass Soybeans ×19 Tasty Mushroom ×12 Warming Ginger ×11 57

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Whether this is the kind of vegetable stalk that Farfetch'd like is unknown.

Whether this is the kind of vegetable stalk that Farfetch'd like is unknown.
